title: Eretes sticticus
author: Ribera, Ignacio
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Eretes sticticus  (Linnaeus, 1767)    Published records.  BRANCUCCI (1980); PEDERZANI (2003); HÁJEK & REITER (2014).   Material examined.  Oman, Al Hadd, 22°26′03″N 59°38′49″E, 20.xi.2016, S. Carranza, M. Simó & D. Fernández leg.: 2 ♀♀ (one used for DNA extraction, voucher No. IBE-AN688).   Notes.  The identity of the species has been confirmed through the study of the COI gene (unpublished data).   Hydaticini
